summary: Start M6 with an honest on-demand printability report for the last full binary-STL render, isolated behind a bounded worker client.

decisions.decision: Report topology edge counts and exact model bounds, and label the minimum-feature result as a sampled non-adjacent surface-separation heuristic. Report overhangs and any bounded-out heuristic as NOT CHECKED, with no aggregate print-ready state.
decisions.rationale: FR-15.9 requires useful design feedback while forbidding a UI that makes uncomputed manufacturing claims look proven.

decisions.decision: Analyze a defensive copy of the last full binary-STL presentation in a dedicated worker with strict response decoding, cancellation, a 100000-vertex heuristic cap, and refusal of a main-thread fallback above 1 MiB.
decisions.rationale: The check is explicit and potentially expensive; bounding both data and fallback behavior keeps it responsive without accepting preview geometry or transferring away the viewer's owned bytes.

testEvidence.criterion: FR-15.9 and AC-15.g require exact honest results for a deliberately non-manifold fixture and no aggregate readiness claim.
testEvidence.test: Exercise a closed mesh, the exact non-manifold report, build-volume failure, minimum-feature warning, invalid input, and the user-facing Manufacturing activity.

red.outcome: RED: the printability analysis module and Manufacturing activity did not exist.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/manufacturing tests/ui/manufacturing tests/application/layout/workspace-layout.test.ts tests/ui/layout/WorkspaceFrame.test.tsx

testEvidence.criterion: Only the last full render may feed printability, and analysis must not detach viewer-owned bytes or block the main thread for large meshes.
testEvidence.test: Exercise worker transfer ownership, strict response validation, abort, bounded fallback, and a Workbench transition from preview to full render.

red.outcome: RED: no off-main-thread printability client existed.

green.outcome: GREEN: the real Workbench kept the action disabled after preview, enabled it after full render, and dispatched exactly preview then full quality.

testEvidence.criterion: The integrated feature must preserve repository source policy and static correctness.
testEvidence.test: Run the one bounded lint/source-policy and TypeScript checks after the implementation corrections.

red.outcome: RED: three mechanical callback/dependency lint findings were reported.

green.command: pnpm.cmd run lint; pnpm.cmd run typecheck
green.outcome: GREEN: lint checked 580 files, source policy passed, and TypeScript completed without errors.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
